title: Phase 1 spec: slash commands (model/compact/resume/rewind/mcp/hooks/permissions/agents/skills/cost/plan/thinkback/teleport/effort/fast) [CC parity]
description:
## Goal

Extract a behavioral spec for this subsystem by reading Claude Code's TypeScript source. **Output**: update this issue body with a markdown spec pinning down each testable contract (input ‚Üí expected output, edge cases, error paths). No Rust yet ‚Äî that is Phase 2.

Parent audit: #523.

## Claude Code source ‚Äî read these

- `commands/compact/index.ts`
- `commands/resume/index.ts`
- `commands/rewind/rewind.ts`
- `commands/mcp/index.ts`
- `commands/permissions/index.ts`
- `commands/agents/index.ts`
- `commands/skills/index.ts`
- `commands/cost/cost.ts`
- `commands/plan/index.ts`
- `commands/thinkback/index.ts`
- `commands/teleport/index.ts`
- `commands/effort/index.ts`
- `commands/fast/index.ts`
- `commands/` (overall: 80+ subdirs)

## OpenClaudia counterpart

- `src/cli/repl/slash.rs` (~1978 lines, single file all handlers) ‚Äî compact 346, resume 245, effort 463-468, plan 460, model 286-287, cost 1088, agents 494, skill 825
- `src/cli/repl/plan_mode.rs` (~253 lines)
- `src/cli/repl/models.rs`

## Behaviors to specify

For each, capture: input shape, expected output, error paths, side effects, and at least one edge case.

1. `/compact` (or `/summarize`) triggers `SlashCommandResult::Compact`
2. `/continue`, `/load`, `/resume` all resolve to session resume handler
3. `/effort <level>` updates effort state and prints confirmation
4. `/plan` toggles plan mode via `SlashCommandResult::ToggleMode`
5. `/model list` prints available models; `/model <name>` switches provider
6. `/cost` prints session token + cost summary
7. `/agents` lists running subagent instances
8. `/skill` and `/skills` invoke skill system
9. Unknown slash command (`/asdfasdf`) returns explicit error (not silent fall-through)

## Gaps already visible from the brief

These are CC features OpenClaudia does not implement. Do **not** include them in the spec ‚Äî file each as a separate feature/refactor issue and link back here.

- **`/rewind` missing** ‚Äî file: "Add `/rewind` to restore prior conversation state"
- **`/teleport` missing** ‚Äî file: "Add `/teleport` to jump to named checkpoint"
- **`/thinkback` missing** ‚Äî file: "Add `/thinkback` to replay thinking blocks"
- **`/fast` missing** ‚Äî file: "Add `/fast` to toggle fast mode"
- **`/mcp` is read-only** ‚Äî file: "Expand `/mcp` to interactive add/remove/auth (parity with CC)"
- **`/hooks` and `/permissions` as interactive UIs missing** ‚Äî file: "Add interactive `/hooks` and `/permissions` management UIs"

## Done when

- This issue body has been edited to contain a markdown spec, one section per behavior above
- Each behavior section names the function(s) on both sides (or marks the OC side missing)
- Every gap above has been filed as its own issue and linked here
- The matching Phase 2 issue is unblocked
